key.name: auto-sync
key.summary: Auto-sync icon theme with accent color
key.description: When enabled, automatically changes the icon theme to match the GNOME accent color.

key.name: manual-color
key.summary: Manually selected color when auto-sync is off
key.description: The Adwaita Colors variant to use when auto-sync is disabled.

key.name: install-scope
key.description: Whether to install themes for the current user only or system-wide.

key.name: installed-version
key.description: The version tag of the currently installed Adwaita Colors theme (e.g. v2.4.0).

key.name: last-update-check
key.summary: Timestamp of last update check (Unix seconds)
key.description: Unix timestamp of when the extension last checked GitHub for a new release.

key.name: skipped-version
key.summary: Version tag the user chose to skip
key.description: If set, update notifications for this version will be suppressed.

key.name: show-panel-indicator
key.description: Display a colored circle in the top panel for quick color switching.

key.name: custom-install-path
key.description: Override the default installation directory. Leave empty for automatic detection.
